heading: Recording of obligations against accounts receivable and crediting of amounts received; work involving cooperation with State, Territory, etc.
label: 50b Recording of obligations against accounts receivable and crediting of amounts received; work involving cooperation with State, Territory, etc.
text: Before, on, and after , in carrying out work involving cooperation with any State, Territory, possession, or political subdivision thereof, the United States Geological Survey may, notwithstanding any other provision of law, record obligations against accounts receivable from any such entities and shall credit amounts received from such entities to this appropriation.October 18, 1986
notes: References in TextThis appropriation, referred to in text, probably means appropriations under the headings “” and “” of the annual Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act.Geological Surveysurveys, investigations, and research
Codificationis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500In text, “Before, on, and after ” substituted for “heretofore and hereafter”.October 18, 1986
Change of Name“United States Geological Survey” substituted in text for “Geological Survey” pursuant to provision of title I of , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–154section 31 of this title
